_note: HYPOTHESES, not facts. Used only to NARROW research. The pipeline MUST re-confirm each with a fresh search + at least one resolving evidence URL (Flag D). If the fresh search contradicts the hypothesis, the SEARCH WINS and the contradiction is logged. Every preseeded app is a priority hand-check target.

confidence_tiers.confirmed: Verified by live web search on 2026-07-09.
confidence_tiers.high: High-confidence prior; verify fast, do not skip.
confidence_tiers.low: Uncertain prior; pipeline decides from evidence.
confidence_tiers.non_api: Likely no accessible self-serve public API; a valid finding, not a failure.

patterns.api-exists-not-accessible: A public API exists but access is gated behind business verification / app review.
patterns.good-api-no-entry-point: Well-built API, but keys require already being a paying customer (no public signup/trial). recommended_next_action=Partner-Gated.

hypothesis.main_blocker: Requires a paid Professional Seller account ($39.99/mo) plus a developer approval process (days to weeks).

seeds.rationale: AWS SP-API docs confirm paid seller account + approval queue.

hypothesis.main_blocker: Broad, well-documented REST/OAuth2 API, but keys are only issuable by an admin on an existing paid DealCloud site; no public trial/signup.

seeds.rationale: api.docs.dealcloud.com shows a strong API; entry point requires existing paid account.
